post.subject: RARRR
post.body:
DAMMIT!! My head hurts! 

Funeral for a Friend were pretty good. Though I couldnt stick the moshin much and my drink kept gettin spilt so i went upstairs for a while. Then when i went back down I couldnt find people :(

When it was over I walked - stumbled - to the limelight where i drank some more. Basically it was pretty nuts and i was completely fucked and dont remember it all. 

Why do I have a birthday card in my room?? Its not my birthday.
